title: CI Baseline Triage: Determine Root Cause of GitHub Actions Failures
description: Triage failing GitHub Actions across PRs #27 and #28 to determine whether failures are pre-existing repo-wide baseline issues or introduced by the PR changes. Do NOT merge. Do NOT patch. Generate receipt only.
blockers: PR #27 (ops/agent-command-bus) is blocked on CI failure
PR #28 (agent/manus/P0-001) is blocked on CI failure
Cannot merge governance files while safety gates are broken

acceptance_criteria: Identifies pre-existing baseline failures vs. PR-introduced failures

notes: This is a discovery task. Manus analyzes but does not modify CI config or merge anything. Output is a receipt that informs the next three P0 tasks.
